user_query: Why did Deborah spend time in the garden?

node_data.text: Deborah finds peace and comfort in roses and dahlias in her garden after losing a friend last week.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Directly explains why Deborah spends time in the garden, mentioning her need for peace and comfort after a loss.
